underlying_goal: Fix a bug identified in code review where soft-deleted records cause silent no-ops in the condensed features upsert logic, and update all related tests
friction_detail: Initial code changes caused test failures due to replication lag in test environment (knexRead vs knexWrite) and incomplete test mock updates.
brief_summary: User shared a code review identifying a soft-deleted record collision bug; Claude implemented an atomic upsert fix across model, service, and tests, fixed test failures after user reported them, and all 105 tests passed.
